rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal — no Iberian wildfires, no EU energy shocks, no Atlantic shipping disruptions; World Cup is sports/culture noise.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal stalemate keeps a mild ceiling on any energy price relief for Portugal. No direct impact but indirect cost-of-living pressure from oil markets persists.

top_events.title: Trump targeting immigrants from countries hit most by climate shocks
top_events.summary: US immigration policy shifts could affect Portuguese-speaking communities (Brazil, Lusophone Africa) with some diaspora links to Portugal. Impact remains indirect and marginal.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight migrant peril
top_events.summary: Canary Islands migration route is geographically close to Portugal's Atlantic sphere; Pope's visit draws attention to ongoing Atlantic migration pressure relevant to Iberian context.
